metadata.description: End-to-end demo of the plugin-marketplace + sidecar pattern: a Claude Code plugin authors structured work tickets; a browser-extension sidecar fills them into an API-less internal tool.

plugins.name: workorder-smith
plugins.description: Author work-order tickets in the exact contract format the AcmeOps sidecar parses and fills — the demo's 'design in Claude, land in the niche software' lane.
